narrative:
Portage County has 106,419 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.5% of registrants.
